final:
module RefModule(
  input in0,
  input in1,
  input in2,
  input in3,
  input sel0,
  input sel1,
  output reg out // Change to output reg
);// Implement the 4:1 MUX using a case statement
  always @(*) begin
    case ({sel1, sel0})
      2'b00: out = in0;
      2'b01: out = in1;
      2'b10: out = in2;
      2'b11: out = in3;
      default: out = 1'b0; // Default case to avoid latches
    endcase
  end

endmodule
